questions.content:
You will hear two friends talking about a website they use.
They both think

options.text: it can be difficult to choose a date or time.
it's cheaper if you book immediately.
you get the tickets very quickly.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 11 của test2.

questions.content:
You will hear two friends talking about a photography competition.
The man's brother

options.text: gets permission before using a photo.
has strangers asking him to take a photo of them.
has never deleted a photo.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 12 của test2.

questions.content:
You will hear two friends talking about the man's birthday.
What does he say about the morning?

options.text: He usually has breakfast in bed.
His son got up late.

His son and daughter were laughing and joking.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 13 của test2.

options.text: she never finds it difficult sleeping.
she keeps a record of how well she sleeps.
she never thinks about work at night.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 14 của test2.

questions.content: What does Tom say about his business?

options.text: It's difficult to get enough work.
He doesn·t only train cyclists.
There are some people he chooses not to help.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 22 của test2.

options.text: don·t like being watched while they exercise.
dislike early morning sessions.
have training sessions before they go to work.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 24 của test2.

questions.content:
You will hear two friends talking about litter.
They both agree

options.text: there aren't enough street cleaners.
people drop litter without thinking.
people should tidy up litter in their street.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 9 của test2.

questions.content:
You will hear a woman telling a friend about a new car.
What does she say about it?

options.text: She has seen one she likes in town.
A colleague has a similar car.
She plans to drive to work.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 10 của test2.

options.text: people don·t train properly.
he found it hard to push himself.
his injury was a useful experience.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 21 của test2.

questions.content: What does Tom say about using a gym for training?

options.text: He prefers to use the gym.
The gym can get too warm.
People work harder in a gym.

questions.explanation: Giải thích cho câu 23 của test2.

questions.content: What does Tom think about the summer period?

options.text: It is his busiest time.
He has to take a holiday.

It has advantages and disadvantages.
